# Handoff: architect -> implementation

<!-- HANDOFF_META: START -->
from: architect
to: implementation
iteration: 1
<!-- HANDOFF_META: END -->

## Tasks

- [ ] Implement the interfaces and flows described in architecture.md.
- [ ] Add targeted tests for the implementation path and edge cases.
- [ ] Update any user-facing docs or examples that changed.

## Context

The implementation stage should follow the architecture decisions in order and keep the plan aligned with the concrete design.

## Acceptance

- The implementation satisfies the design constraints from architecture.md.
- The new tests pass without regressions.
- The handoff tasks are reflected in the downstream plan.
